attributes.description: This dashboard provides real-time visibility into web application attack activity against a DVWA (Damn Vulnerable Web Application) target. It was built as part of a home SOC lab to simulate and detect common web attacks including SQL injection, command injection, brute force authentication attacks, XSS, and automated web scanning. Data is collected via Filebeat Apache module and shipped to Elasticsearch. Panels display attack traffic over time, top attacking IPs, HTTP response code distribution, request methods, most targeted URLs, and attacker tool signatures identified through user agent analysis. Attacks were simulated from a Kali Linux VM using Nikto, Hydra, and SQLmap.
